**Body**:

- Dark green header (#1A2E1A) with WanderLess branding across all screens

- MatchCard: circular photo, star ratings, language pairs, green View Profile button

- Profile: interest bars, detail list
- Bottom nav: Discover / My Trip / Profile tabs
- Bottom nav shell via GoRouter ShellRoute
- Onboarding: green branding, step indicators
- Backend: UTF-8 encoding on all CSV reads, defensive language pair display
- Backend: POST /api/admin/reseed endpoint
